zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph d'Aubigny於大約1173年出生在英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比時，他的父親Elias d'Aubigny11171歲，母親Hawise d' Aubigny11171歲。他和Maud or Mahet de Montsorel至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1220年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特素斯 瑟頓享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph d'Aubigny was born about 1173, in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Elias d'Aubigny, was 11171 and his mother, Hawise d' Aubigny, was 11171. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Maud or Mahet de Montsorel. He died in 1220, in South Petherton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph d'Aubigny est né environ 1173, à South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Elias d'Aubigny, avait 11171 ans et sa mère, Hawise d' Aubigny, avait 11171 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Maud or Mahet de Montsorel. Il est décédé en 1220, à South Petherton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Maud or Mahet de Montsorel. Morì nel 1220, nel South Petherton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph d'Aubignyが約1173年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス イングレビーで生まれた時，父Elias d'Aubignyは11171歳，母Hawise d' Aubignyは11171歳であった。彼はMaud or Mahet de Montsorelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1220年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトソウス ペスエルトンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1173년 영국 링코실르 소우스 잉글레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Elias d'Aubigny(은)는 11171세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise d' Aubigny(은)는 11171세였다. 그는 Maud or Mahet de Montsorel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 소우스 페더턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph d'Aubigny родился около 1173 г. в местности соут инглеби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Elias d'Aubigny было 11171 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise d' Aubigny, 11171. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Maud or Mahet de Montsorel. Он умер в 1220 г. в местности соут петиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
